title: Metnos planner_split calibration set
description: Per-language thresholds for the PLANNER split decision (ADR 0151). 3-level lookup: user file > this library file > scheduler v2 task. Until calibration generation runs, all sets in this library use conservative defaults.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on backward-incompatible field changes.

lang.description: ISO 639-1 language code (it, en, es, fr, de, ...). Must match the DEFAULT_LANG of the deploy.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the calibration was computed.

metnos_commit.description: Git commit hash of the repo at calibration time. Used for staleness check.

model.description: LLM model that ran the calibration. Default tier MIDDLE Gemma 4 26B.

corpus_size.description: Number of queries in the corpus that produced this calibration.

corpus_hash.description: sha256 of the corpus, for traceability and re-run detection.

threshold_default.description: Default selector confidence threshold for fallback monolithic. Conservative when no per-verb override available.

threshold_by_verb.description: Override threshold per canonical verb (delete, send, write, move, share, set, create — typically higher for safety-critical mutating verbs).

rank_distance_min.description: Minimum prefilter rank-1 minus rank-2 score distance to consider the pool top-1 'confident'. Below this distance, split should fallback to monolithic.
